P enalty
sections.text:
CHAPTER 203
PLUMAGE BIRDS PROTECTION 23 of 1915
47 of 1970
13 of 1994
An Act to prohibit the export of the plumage of wild birds, except for scientific or Government Notices
educational purposes; and to provide for matters incidental thereto. 277 of 1964
497 of 1964
[27th November, 1915]

sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Plumage Birds Protection Act. Short title
sections.text:
Copyright Ministry of Legal Affairs, Government of the Republic of Zambia
The Laws of Zambia

sections.heading: In this Act, unless the context otherwise requires- Interpretation
sections.text:
"Director" means the Director of the Department of Wildlife, Fisheries and National
Parks;
"plumage" includes the skin or body of a bird with the plumage on it.
(As amended by G.N. No. 277 of 1964)

sections.heading: No person shall export or cause or procure to be exported or have in his Prohibition on export
sections.text:
possession for the purpose of export from Zambia any plumage of any wild birds. or sale of plumage
birds
(2) No person shall sell or offer or expose for sale in Zambia or have in his
possession in Zambia for the purpose of sale any plumage of any wild birds.
(3) The prohibitions contained in subsections (1) and (2) shall not apply to-
(a) the plumage of wild birds for the time being excluded from the operation of
this Act by statutory notice;
(b) the plumage of wild birds in respect of which a permit has been granted
under this Act;
(c) the plumage of wild birds ordinarily used as articles of diet.
(As amended by No. 47 of 1970)

sections.heading: The Director may, from time to time by statutory notice, exclude any wild bird Power to exclude birds
sections.text:
from the operation of this Act for such period or periods as he may prescribe or until from operation of this
further notice. Act
(As amended by G.N. No. 277 of 1964)

sections.heading: Where the Director is satisfied that the plumage of any wild birds is to be sold or Permits
sections.text:
exported for scientific or educational purposes, he may grant a permit in writing
authorising such sale or export.
(As amended by G.N. No. 277 of 1964)

sections.heading: Any person contravening the provisions of section three shall be guilty of an Penalty
sections.text:
offence and shall be liable, on conviction, to a fine not exceeding three hundred penalty
units or, in default of payment, to imprisonment with or without hard labour for a period not
exceeding three months.
(As amended by Act No. 13 of 1994)
